channel.title: JobHelper Career Advice Blog
channel.description: Expert career advice, job search tips, CV writing guides, and interview prep for South Africans. Your guide to landing your dream job.

item.title: How to Write a Winning CV in South Africa (2024)
item.description: Learn the secrets of crafting a CV that gets noticed by South African recruiters. Our comprehensive guide covers format, content, and common mistakes to avoid.
item.author: Sarah Mitchell

news:news.news:title: How to Write a Winning CV in South Africa (2024)
news:news.news:keywords: CV, resume, job search, South Africa, career

item.title: Top 50 Highest Paying Jobs in South Africa 2024
item.description: Discover the highest paying careers in SA, from IT to finance. Includes salary ranges and required qualifications for each profession.
item.author: James Cooper

news:news.news:title: Top 50 Highest Paying Jobs in South Africa 2024
news:news.news:keywords: salary, highest paying, jobs, South Africa

item.title: Complete Guide to Government Jobs: Z83 Form Explained
item.description: Everything you need to know about applying for government positions in South Africa. Master the Z83 form and improve your chances.
item.author: Priya Naidoo

news:news.news:title: Complete Guide to Government Jobs: Z83 Form Explained
news:news.news:keywords: government jobs, Z83, public sector, South Africa

item.title: Common Interview Questions and How to Answer Them
item.description: Prepare for your next interview with our guide to the most asked questions in South African job interviews.
item.author: Michael Ross

news:news.news:title: Common Interview Questions and How to Answer Them

item.title: How to Negotiate Your Salary in South Africa
item.description: Don't leave money on the table. Learn effective salary negotiation strategies that work in the SA market.
item.author: Lisa Johnson

news:news.news:title: How to Negotiate Your Salary in South Africa

item.title: Best Graduate Programmes in South Africa 2024
item.description: Top graduate programmes offered by leading South African companies. Apply now and kickstart your career.
item.author: David Kim

news:news.news:title: Best Graduate Programmes in South Africa 2024
news:news.news:keywords: graduate programmes, entry level, South Africa

item.title: CV vs Resume: What's the Difference?
item.description: Do you need a CV or a resume? Understand the key differences and when to use each.
item.author: Sarah Mitchell

news:news.news:title: CV vs Resume: What's the Difference?

item.title: Soft Skills SA Employers Want in 2024
item.description: Beyond qualifications, employers are looking for these essential soft skills. Boost your employability today.
item.author: James Cooper

news:news.news:title: Soft Skills SA Employers Want in 2024
